title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 238.320 - Project plans, commission approval of
text:
238.320.  Project plans, commission approval of. — Before construction of any project, the corporation shall submit the final financing plan and final construction plans and specifications to the commission for its approval.  The corporation shall make any revisions in the plans and specifications required by the commission.  After the commission approves the final financing plan, construction plans and specifications, the corporation shall obtain prior commission approval of any modification of such plans or specifications.
(L. 1990 S.B. 479 & 649 § 18) 
Effective 5-30-90
